productDisplayName: Tantra Men Imagine No Corruption Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Teal blue round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton that blue fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline and graphic print on the front with lettering Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery With anti-corruption becoming the latest fad, this teal blue t-shirt from tantra will give you the opportunity to tell the world what you stand for. Just as John Lennon stood for peace and a better world, show everyone that you dream of an India with no corruption, black money, scams and greed. Pair it with jeans or shorts for a perfectly casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
